response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Scene 1 audio matches the tail end of the Reference JSON lyrics for 'Gold Unbalance'. Scene 2 (presentation) required manual transcription as no lyrics/reference text was provided. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized Reference JSON for song lyrics disambiguation in Scene 1. Scene 2 was manually transcribed using native audio perception. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps anchored strictly to vocal onsets. Aggressive end-time truncation and instantaneous transitions used for rapid transitions in song and speech. Outro card text included as a prominent visual event.

subtitles.original: 舐めんじゃねーよ
subtitles.english: Don't you underestimate me!

subtitles.original: 本能をヒリつかせて
subtitles.english: Letting my instincts tingle,

subtitles.original: 本物見せつけろ
subtitles.english: I'll show them the real thing!

subtitles.original: 圧倒　絶頂
subtitles.english: Overwhelming, at the peak,

subtitles.original: アンバランスを踊れ
subtitles.english: dance the unbalance!

subtitles.original: 踊れ
subtitles.english: Dance!

subtitles.original: 踊れ
subtitles.english: Dance!

subtitles.original: Thanks for watching everybody!
subtitles.english: Thanks for watching everybody!

subtitles.original:
Thank you to my guest, thank you to the band,
thank you everyone!
subtitles.english: Thank you to my guest, the band, and everyone!

subtitles.original: Come hang out at members gentei!
subtitles.english: Come hang out at the members-only stream!

subtitles.original: OK, この後もよろしく！
subtitles.english: OK, see you there too!

subtitles.original: Yeah, and 5 is good.
subtitles.english: Yeah, and 5 is good.

subtitles.original: That's about all you guys, I'm Mori Calliope.
subtitles.english: That's about all for now, guys. I'm Mori Calliope.

subtitles.original: Peace out, see ya!
subtitles.english: Peace out, see ya!

subtitles.original: Let's go, yeah! Bye.
subtitles.english: Let's go, yeah! Bye.

subtitles.original: Heh, what's up you crazy skeletons... (coughs)
subtitles.english: Heh, what's up you crazy skeletons... (coughs)

subtitles.original:
I mean, dearest Dead Beats,
the hour is finally upon us.
subtitles.english:
I mean, dearest Dead Beats,
the hour is finally upon us.

subtitles.original:
The sale of Mori Calliope's birthday
celebration goods is about to begin.
subtitles.english:
The sale of Mori Calliope's birthday
celebration goods is about to begin.

subtitles.original:
On this most auspicious day, you've been
granted a great blessing by Death herself.
subtitles.english:
On this most auspicious day, you've been
granted a great blessing by Death herself.

subtitles.original:
A most fortunate occurrence for thee that such a
glorious chest should appear before thine eyes.
subtitles.english:
A most fortunate occurrence for thee that such a
glorious chest should appear before thine eyes.

subtitles.original:
Let's take a peek at what the Goddess of
Death herself has to offer, shall we?
subtitles.english:
Let's take a peek at what the Goddess of
Death herself has to offer, shall we?

subtitles.original: The journey ahead is long and arduous.
subtitles.english: The journey ahead is long and arduous.

subtitles.original:
It would do thee good to prepare for it
with such luxurious treasures.
subtitles.english:
It would do thee good to prepare for it
with such luxurious treasures.

subtitles.original:
Firstly, wouldst thou find comfort
in Dear Death's embrace?
subtitles.english:
Firstly, wouldst thou find comfort
in Dear Death's embrace?

subtitles.original:
If it be so, take some warmth along thy
journey with this very large rollable blanket...
subtitles.english:
If it be so, take some warmth along thy
journey with this very large rollable blanket...

subtitles.original:
...featuring a most intimidating
and battle-ready maiden.
subtitles.english:
...featuring a most intimidating
and battle-ready maiden.

subtitles.original: Yours truly!
subtitles.english: Yours truly!

subtitles.original:
Designed by my favorite dark fantasy
artist, Shimhaq!
subtitles.english:
Designed by my favorite dark fantasy
artist, Shimhaq!

subtitles.original:
The maiden in question possesses artworks
en masse from this particular individual...
subtitles.english:
The maiden in question possesses artworks
en masse from this particular individual...

subtitles.original:
...so I'd be most elated if you
bought it for yourself.
subtitles.english:
...so I'd be most elated if you
bought it for yourself.

subtitles.original:
Lay it across your bed, hang it on your
wall, take it with you on an outing...
subtitles.english:
Lay it across your bed, hang it on your
wall, take it with you on an outing...

subtitles.original: Think of the possibilities!
subtitles.english: Think of the possibilities!

subtitles.original:
Secondly, whilst on thy noble journey, thou
mayest come to need a spark of aid.
subtitles.english:
Secondly, whilst on thy noble journey, thou
mayest come to need a spark of aid.

subtitles.original: If it be so, take one of these amulets.
subtitles.english: If it be so, take one of these amulets.

subtitles.original: The emblem of a Knight to boost your Strength.
subtitles.english: The emblem of a Knight to boost your Strength.

subtitles.original:
The emblem of a Samurai to grant
you additional Dexterity.
subtitles.english:
The emblem of a Samurai to grant
you additional Dexterity.

subtitles.original:
The emblem of a Priestess to bestow
additional Health to thy weary body.
subtitles.english:
The emblem of a Priestess to bestow
additional Health to thy weary body.

subtitles.original:
And lastly, the emblem of a Necromancer
to grant thee additional Intelligence.
subtitles.english:
And lastly, the emblem of a Necromancer
to grant thee additional Intelligence.

subtitles.original:
Alas, as Fortune be a fickle mistress, thou
may only receive one in a set.
subtitles.english:
Alas, as Fortune be a fickle mistress, thou
may only receive one in a set.

subtitles.original:
I pray thee be granted the boon most
favorable to thy quest.
subtitles.english:
I pray thee be granted the boon most
favorable to thy quest.

subtitles.original:
Or, or you could just purchase them all separately
if you're looking to speedrun the experience.
subtitles.english:
Or, or you could just purchase them all separately
if you're looking to speedrun the experience.

subtitles.original:
Thirdly, I present to thee the shining
centerpiece of this valuable collection.
subtitles.english:
Thirdly, I present to thee the shining
centerpiece of this valuable collection.

subtitles.original:
Take a moment of repose and sit beside
this warm and healing light...
subtitles.english:
Take a moment of repose and sit beside
this warm and healing light...

subtitles.original: ...granted unto thee by Death herself.
subtitles.english: ...granted unto thee by Death herself.

subtitles.original:
A lantern to revive thee as many times as needed
throughout even the most daunting of journeys.
subtitles.english:
A lantern to revive thee as many times as needed
throughout even the most daunting of journeys.

subtitles.original:
May it light thy way to victory, or to
sweet dreams, whichever is preferred.
subtitles.english:
May it light thy way to victory, or to
sweet dreams, whichever is preferred.

subtitles.original:
Enjoy an elegant design chosen
specifically by myself.
subtitles.english:
Enjoy an elegant design chosen
specifically by myself.

subtitles.original:
And of course, how could one continue a journey
into vast lands without a source of healing?
subtitles.english:
And of course, how could one continue a journey
into vast lands without a source of healing?

subtitles.original:
Rejuvenate thyself with this generous flask,
or rather glass...
subtitles.english:
Rejuvenate thyself with this generous flask,
or rather glass...

subtitles.original:
...that seems to refill endlessly upon
rest at your lantern.
subtitles.english:
...that seems to refill endlessly upon
rest at your lantern.

subtitles.original: At least, I think it will.
subtitles.english: At least, I think it will.

subtitles.original:
There really are no guarantees, but give it a
try yourself, see if the myths are true.
subtitles.english:
There really are no guarantees, but give it a
try yourself, see if the myths are true.

subtitles.original:
Enjoy your favorite beverage during a night
of exploring your favorite fantasy scenarios.
subtitles.english:
Enjoy your favorite beverage during a night
of exploring your favorite fantasy scenarios.

subtitles.original:
But naturally, it would do me no good to leave
thee without, I don't know, a bedtime story?
subtitles.english:
But naturally, it would do me no good to leave
thee without, I don't know, a bedtime story?

subtitles.original: To put this enchanting collection into context.
subtitles.english: To put this enchanting collection into context.

subtitles.original:
So, please enjoy a short audiobook-style recording
of a fantastical story, written by yours truly.
subtitles.english:
So, please enjoy a short audiobook-style recording
of a fantastical story, written by yours truly.

subtitles.original: Believe it or not, we are the stars of this tale.
subtitles.english: Believe it or not, we are the stars of this tale.

subtitles.original:
So enjoy it on a rainy evening, wrapped
warmly in Death's embrace.
subtitles.english:
So enjoy it on a rainy evening, wrapped
warmly in Death's embrace.

subtitles.original: The, the blanket, I mean.
subtitles.english: The, the blanket, I mean.

You can use the flask also for like
drinking at the same time.
subtitles.english:
You can use the flask also for like
drinking at the same time.

subtitles.original:
I don't know, just, you should
really buy the full set.

I don't know, just, you should

And definitely do, because lucky skeletons who
act fast and purchase the entire set...
subtitles.english:
And definitely do, because lucky skeletons who
act fast and purchase the entire set...

subtitles.original: ...will be granted a hand-signed postcard...
subtitles.english: ...will be granted a hand-signed postcard...

subtitles.original:
...with a special color variant of Shimhaq's
masterpiece rendition of Death herself.
subtitles.english:
...with a special color variant of Shimhaq's
masterpiece rendition of Death herself.

subtitles.original:
The hand-signed option is in limited supply,

The hand-signed option is in limited supply,

subtitles.original:
For those that are unable to secure this extremely

subtitles.english:
For those that are unable to secure this extremely

subtitles.original:
By purchasing the entire set, a duplicated foil-

subtitles.english:
By purchasing the entire set, a duplicated foil-

subtitles.original:
That is all from me, Death's Maiden and
Dark Fantasy Enjoyer, Mori Calliope.
subtitles.english:
That is all from me, Death's Maiden and

subtitles.original:
This year's goods are very different, but I wanted

This year's goods are very different, but I wanted

subtitles.original:
And has really made every day of

subtitles.english:
And has really made every day of

subtitles.original:
I am so grateful to you guys for coming

subtitles.english:
I am so grateful to you guys for coming

Comment and let me know what

Be sure to like the concert so

subtitles.original: And subscribe if you enjoy Mori Calliope.
subtitles.english: And subscribe if you enjoy Mori Calliope.

subtitles.original: With that, I bid thee farewell.

subtitles.english: And happy birthday to me!!
